name: 🚀 Thermal Rockets
overview:
Upgrades the Rocket Launcher to fire Thermal Detonators.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Weapon:** `WP_PLX1` / `MB_ATT_PLX1`.
*   **Projectile:** Fires a Thermal Detonator instead of a standard rocket.
*   **Damage:** **Massive** (Thermal Detonator damage scaling).
*   **Arc:** Projectile may have a slight arc compared to straight rocket?
tips: **Siege Breaker:** One of the most destructive weapons in the game.
description: Upgrades the Rocket Launcher to fire Thermal Detonators.

name: 🔥 Extra Flame Damage
overview:
Superheats the Flamethrower output.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Damage:** **+100%** (Double Damage) on Flamethrower.
*   **Visual:** **Blue Fire** effect.
tips: Elite Mandalorians or heavy incendiary units.

name: 🩸 Acid Blood
overview:
The character's blood is highly corrosive.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Trigger:** Taking damage from a close-range source (Melee/Saber).
*   **Effect:** Sprays acid on the attacker.
*   **Damage:** Poisons the attacker (Damage over Time).
*   **Death:** Release a poison cloud upon death? (Wiki: "If a player... dies, enemies nearby are briefly poisoned").
tips: **Aliens:** Noghri, Trandoshans, Xenomorph-types.
**Tactics:** Punishes Jedi for aggressive melee spam.
description: The character's blood is highly corrosive.

name: ❄️ Icethrower
overview:
Converts the Flamethrower into a Cryo-projector.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Weapon:** `MB_ATT_FLAMETHROWER` / `WP_THROWER`.
*   **Visual:** Blue "flame".
*   **Effect:** **Freezes** enemies on contact (Stun/Slow) instead of burning.
tips: Carbonite Troopers or specialized Droids.
description: Converts the Flamethrower into a Cryo-projector.

name: ☢️ Real Thermal Detonator
overview:
Unleashes the true, canon-accurate power of a Thermal Detonator.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Blast Radius:** **Massive** (Nuclear). Clears entire rooms.
*   **Damage:** **Instakill**. Ignores almost all damage reduction.
*   **Fuse:** Often has a longer fuse/distinct warning audio.
*   **Replacement:** Replaces Frag Grenades (`WP_FRAG_NADE`) if `WP_THERMAL` is not specified? (Check implementation). Usually applies to `WP_REAL_TD`.

**⚠️ Warning**
*   **Friendly Fire:** Will almost certainly kill the user if not thrown far enough.
*   **Balance:** Extremely powerful; usually limited to 1 per life.
tips: Boss characters (Jabba, Leia) or objective-breaching "Nuke" classes.
description: Unleashes the true, canon-accurate power of a Thermal Detonator.

name: 📈 Stat Viewer
overview:
Allows the player to see detailed stats of allies.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **HUD:** Displays Health and Shield bars above teammates' heads.
*   **Wallhack:** Often allows seeing these bars through walls.
tips: **Medics:** Mandatory for effective healing.
**Officers:** Good for tactical awareness.
description: Allows the player to see detailed stats of allies.

name: 🥊 Heavy Melee
overview:
Transforms melee combat into a slow, devastating brawler style.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Damage:** **+100%** (Double Damage). Base Melee is ~15-20, so Heavy is ~30-40 per hit.
*   **Animation:** Forces "Heavy" animations (Haymakers).
*   **Speed:** Attacks are slower and more telegraphed.
*   **Knockback:** Increases force, sending enemies flying.

**🔄 Synergies**
*   **Wookiee Strength:** Stacks damage modifiers.
*   Str 1: +Damage.
*   Str 3: **Lethal**. Can hit for 80+ damage.
*   **High Health:** Necessary to trade hits.
tips: Best for "Brute" characters like Wookiees, Gamorreans, or SBDs.
description: Transforms melee combat into a slow, devastating brawler style.

name: ❌ No Pickups
overview:
Prevents the character from picking up dropped weapons.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Scavenging:** **Disabled**. You can only use what you spawn with.
tips: **Droids:** SBDs/Droidekas naturally have this.
**Balance:** Prevents a weak class from picking up a dropped Rocket Launcher or Concussion Rifle.
description: Prevents the character from picking up dropped weapons.

name: 💪 Melee Resistance
overview:
Reduces damage taken from physical attacks.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Effect:** **50% Damage Reduction** vs Melee (Punches, Kicks, Wookiee Slams).
*   **Vulnerability:** Does **not** protect against Lightsabers or Blasters.
tips: Essential for "Brawler" characters who want to trade hits in melee.
Counters Wookiees (`MB_ATT_WOOKIE_STRENGTH`) effectively.
description: Reduces damage taken from physical attacks.

name: 👁️ Seeing Stealth
overview:
Advanced optical sensors that bypass standard stealth methods.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Detection:** Grants **Force Sense Immunity**. Wait, per wiki: "Makes a class invisible to Force Seeing".
*   **Correction:** The wiki says `CFL_SEEING_STEALTH` makes the *user* invisible to Force Sense (Immunity).
*   *Self-Correction*: The name implies "Seeing Stealth", but the wiki description says "Force Sense Immunity". Let's verify context. "Seeing Stealth" usually implies *seeing* stealth. "Force Sense Immunity" implies *being* immune.
*   *Re-reading Wiki*: "CFL_SEEING_STEALTH - Force Sense Immunity - Makes a class invisible to Force Seeing." -> Okay, the name is misleading in the code, but the function is **Immunity**.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Stealth:** You **cannot be seen** by Force Sense (`FP_SEE`).
*   **Radar:** You do not appear on Force Sight radar.
tips: Stealth/Infiltrator classes that need to hide from Jedi.
description: Advanced optical sensors that bypass standard stealth methods.

name: 🗿 No Locational Damage
overview:
Uniform damage reception across the entire hitbox.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Headshots:** **0x Bonus** (Takes normal body damage).
*   **Leg/Arm Shots:** **0x Reduction** (Takes normal body damage).
*   **Consistency:** Makes the character feel "tanky" and consistent.
tips: **Droids:** SBDs, Droidekas, Dark Troopers (no vital organs).
**Juggernauts:** Heavily armored units with no weak points.
description: Uniform damage reception across the entire hitbox.

name: 🏃 Run Fast Melee
overview:
Increases movement speed while holding Melee.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Speed:** **1.15x** (15% Faster).
*   **Condition:** Active only when `WP_MELEE` is held.
tips: **Obsolete:** largely replaced by `HELD_SPEED` on weapon flags, but still valid for simple configs.
description: Increases movement speed while holding Melee.

name: 🧱 Disruptor Walls
overview:
High-power energy output for Disruptor Rifles.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Penetration:** Fully charged Disruptor shots pass through **walls**, **doors**, and **multiple enemies**.
*   **Requirement:** Must have `MB_ATT_DISRUPTOR` (Level 2+ recommended for charge speed).
tips: **Anti-Camper:** Kill enemies hiding behind cover.
**Bosses:** Makes a sniper boss terrifyingly oppressive.
description: High-power energy output for Disruptor Rifles.

name: 🆓 BP-Free Jumps
overview:
Jumping does not drain Block Points.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Normal:** Jumping reduces your BP (makes you vulnerable to blaster fire).
*   **Flagged:** Jumping costs 0 BP.
tips: **Acrobats:** Essential for agile Jedi (Yoda, Maul) who rely on constant movement without losing defense.
description: Jumping does not drain Block Points.

name: 💀 Kill Team on Death (VIP)
overview:
Designates the character as a VIP.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Trigger:** When this character dies.
*   **Effect:** **Team Wipe**. Every ally dies instantly.
tips: **VIP Mode:** Create custom "Protect the VIP" scenarios in standard Open/FA matches.
description: Designates the character as a VIP.

name: No Jetpack Cooldown
overview:
Removes the delay between jetpack bursts.

**Effects**
*   **Mobility**: Allows for rapid tapping of the jetpack for "skating" or unpredictable movement.
*   **Flight**: Easier to maintain altitude.

**Use Cases**
*   Elite Mandalorians (e.g. Jango/Boba Fett) for superior aerial agility.
description: Removes the delay between jetpack bursts.

name: 🔫 Akimbo Pistol 3
overview:
Upgrades dual-wielded pistols (Clone/Westar) to Level 3 performance.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Damage:** Applies Pistol 3 damage to *both* guns.
*   **Ammo:** Drains ammo as if firing two level 3 pistols.
tips: Makes dual pistols viable primary weapons for elite classes.
description: Upgrades dual-wielded pistols (Clone/Westar) to Level 3 performance.

name: 💻 Fast Hacking
overview:
Master slicer proficiency.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Speed:** Hacks usable objects (panels, consoles) **4x Faster**.
*   **Objective:** Critical for Siege/Objective modes where time is key.
tips: Tech specialists like **R2-D2**, **Imperial Workers**, or **Slicers**.
Combine with a weak weapon loadout to create a pure "Objective Runner" class.
